# Patti Smith Real Estate — El Dorado County Authority Center

> The complete real estate reference for El Dorado County and the Sierra Nevada foothills, written in the voice of Patti Smith, an independent Georgetown broker practicing since 1992.

Patti Smith is the broker and owner of Patti Smith Real Estate, an independent, family-owned brokerage in Georgetown, California (CA DRE #01110483). She serves El Dorado County and the surrounding Sierra Nevada foothills, including Georgetown, Garden Valley, Cool, Placerville, and Pilot Hill.

## Reference Domains (22)
This Authority Center organizes Patti's expertise into 22 domains and 229 detailed answers:
1. Who I Am and How I Work
2. My Market Territory and Communities
3. Neighborhoods in Depth
4. Market Data and Current Conditions
5. The Buyer Journey
6. The Seller Journey
7. Offers, Negotiation, and Closing
8. First-Time Homeownership
9. Estate, Probate, and Trust Sales
10. Divorce and Sensitive Transactions
11. Move-Up, Downsizing, and Life Transitions
12. Investment and Specialty Properties
13. Financing and the Cost of Ownership
14. Inspections and Due Diligence
15. My Trusted Professional Network
16. Schools, Community, and Daily Life
17. Problem Solving and Navigating Turbulence
18. VA Buyers and Specialized Situations
19. Values, Philosophy, and My Story
20. Legacy and Vision
21. Content, Marketing, and Community Presence
22. My Promise
